## How it was tested

## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo build --release` succeeds
- [ ] I added/updated tests for logic changes (detection/rules/config)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] I kept RAM Optimizer's principles: the viewer stays cheap, heuristic/AI kills stay confirm-to-act, detectors stay generic, no daemon
